title: Creamy Croatian Pasta
description: A classic Croatian-inspired pasta dish made with a creamy sauce and a hint of sweetness from dates.
instructions: Cook pasta according to package instructions until al dente.
In a large skillet, sauté garlic until fragrant.
Add dates to the skillet and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Stir in the creamy sauce and let simmer for 2-3 minutes.
Combine cooked pasta and sauce, tossing until well coated.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
